programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: E123 - The Bucket Trap
programme.desc: Henry and Charlotte want to tell Jasper that Henry is really Kid Danger. They decide to give Jasper a test secret to prove he's ready.

programme.title: E219 - Lay Lay's Little Little
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are assigned a shared Little Buddy, Milaena, they spend the week attempting to create a mini-Sadie and mini-Lay Lay, or 'Say Lay', instead of learning about what Milaena likes and what makes her unique.

programme.title: E104 - The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: Lil's favorite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the café using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. // Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: E282 - Arbor Day Disarray / Ain't That the Tooth
programme.desc: Sandy gives her friends special saltwater trees, but they need more attention than she expected. // SpongeBob and Patrick mistake a burglar for the tooth fairy.

programme.title: E1008 - Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E204 - Lay Lay's Beauty Shop Day Day
programme.desc: It's Lay Lay and Sadie's first-time accompanying Trish to her standing appointment at the Beauty Shop. When Lay Lay starts spilling all the tea, she and Sadie are left with a big mess to clean up in order to get Trish un-banned from the salon.

programme.title: E216 - iMake Sam Girlier
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: E203 - Raph Fights Everyone
programme.desc: With all his family and friends under Kitsune's mind control, Raph no longer wants to fight in the Mutant Battle Arena. But he'll have to (with Pigeon Pete's help) in order to save EVERYONE he loves before it's too late!

programme.title: E125 - Pulling Power / Home Security
programme.desc: Best wins a competition to pitch his story ideas to world famous author A N Other, and finds that three's a crowd. // Best and Bester housesit for Diamondo and realise that there's more to it than massage chairs and unlimited snacks.

programme.title: E212 - The Incredible Shrinking Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself.

programme.title: E221 - Uncle Hambone
programme.desc: When Chapa's little sister needs her help during a city-wide blackout, the rest of Danger Force cross the line as they try to pull her back to power up the Man's Nest and help them win a contest.

programme.title: E523 - Diss the Cook
programme.desc: Lincoln is convinced the middle school lunch lady is holding a grudge against him and his older sisters.

programme.title: E101 - Best Summer Ever?
programme.desc: Jack & Lily are half-siblings living on opposite ends of the world both hoping to have the 'best summer ever.' When dangerous events forces Jack's mom to send him to live with his dad, the kids fear their summer dreams have become a nightmare.

programme.title: E258 - The Goofy Newbie
programme.desc: Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: E1004 - Shred of Evidence
programme.desc: Lola and her nemesis, Lindsey Sweetwater, join forces to uncover a mystery while competing at a pageant.

programme.title: E706 - Road Trip: Bringing Down the House / Road Trip: Mountain Hard Pass
programme.desc: During a visit of the White House, the Loud kids can't help but sneak off and explore the rooms not on the tour. // Intimidated by an intense day of hiking in the Rocky Mountains, the Loud kids try to find reasons to call off the hike.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E5 - Heavy Haulage in the Jungle
programme.desc: Heavy transport in the rainforest. For the Sao Manoel hydroelectric power plant in the heart of Brazil, massive elements have to be delivered over a long and arduous route. The transformers weigh more than 200 tonnes each - the way to the destination, almost 4000 kilometres. Heat, dust and dirt roads that are completely dry and full of bumps. The journey becomes dangerous, sometimes it's a matter of centimetres. Then comes the river crossing - with more than 200 tonnes of cargo. The current is unhurried, but what the river swallows is lost. The transport takes seven weeks and delays cost money, breakdowns cost a lot of money - mistakes must not be made here.

programme.desc: Sara travels to Darwin, visiting markets and experiencing the local culture and delicacies, discovering strong influences from Asia.

programme.desc: It may be the backpacker's must-see, but if you go to the Venice of the East, don't drive!

programme.title: E1 - Highlight 1
programme.desc: A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Down South, Lantern Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down 26-ton dustcart from a busy London street. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm – just a hundred yards away! And Lantern’s night shift recovery op Jason faces a battle to rescue an articulated lorry that’s crashed down a steep ditch off the A1.

programme.title: E2 - Highlight 2
programme.desc: An overturned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane mean trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. Working with the fire service he must all his experience to keep his team out of danger. Meanwhile with very little room to manoeuvre Lantern recovery op Steve must rescue a 44-ton artic stuck in a ditch on a busy five lane roundabout. And Lantern Recovery Op Sean has thought on his feet to break into an abandoned truck!

programme.title: I Am Fine But
programme.desc: A year spent as a volunteer in Berlin. For Angeli from Cameroon, this is the first big trip of his life. How does voluntary service in another country shape a young person?

programme.title: Delhi's Black Kites: How Raptors Keep A Megacity Running
programme.desc: Scientists reveal how Delhi's black kites feed on waste and interact with people. Plus: How a 600-year-old network is easing Bidar's water problems.

programme.title: Breaking Chains
programme.desc: Economic insecurity is part of a cycle of disadvantages for women, often caused by discrimination in employment and education. Women often don't control key assets such as the family home, property, or the right to make financial decisions, further limiting their chances to break the poverty cycle. HER meets three women striving to change that.

programme.title: A Woman In The Well Of Death: India's Bravest Stunt Driver
programme.desc: Rehana Khan is one of India's few female stunt drivers. She tours the country's fairgrounds, drawing crowds as she rips around the 'Well of Death” on her motorcycle - a massive wooden structure with vertical walls. This danger is only compounded by the difficulty in making ends meet for her family as India's travelling fairs struggle to compete with modern entertainment.

programme.title: Electric Fruit: The Nigerian Market Running On Rotten Food

programme.title: Spiked - The Insidious Use Of Knockout Drops
programme.desc: Knockout drops: colorless, tasteless and extremely dangerous. They've been around for decades and are used to incapacitate people in order to rob, rape and even kill them.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals 'Tokyo Bay'
programme.desc: Rarely seen. Up-close with some of the planet's most amazing animals. Enter a world of unique creatures from Asia, Africa and the Americas.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: Hideyoshi rises to become a senior retainer of the Oda clan and is granted Kita-Omi. Building Nagahama Castle, he becomes a daimyo and, together with Koichiro, takes the surname Hashiba. Tasked with governing the castle town, Koichiro struggles with a severe shortage of manpower. On Hanbei's advice, he decides to hold a selection process to recruit capable retainers. As numerous applicants gather, a group of distinctive young men-including Ishida Mitsunari (Matsumoto Reo) and Todo Takatora (Kaku So)-advance to the final stage.

programme.title: Songs For Everyone
programme.desc: A song program where children can sing along by reading the lyrics on the screen.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Set at a convenience store in Mojiko, Kitakyushu, this story follows an unlikely pair: a strikingly handsome manager and a wild, enigmatic man who seems able to handle anything. Together, they take on impossible problems, unfolding a tale filled with humor, mystery, and heartfelt human drama.

programme.title: Songs For Everyone
programme.desc: A song program where children can sing along by reading the lyrics on the screen.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news from Tokyo.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: Child-Rearing Hints & Tips
programme.desc: Experts give advice to the questions and troubles from viewers about child-rearing.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: Music Bank K-Chart

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E3 - Aerial Hunters
programme.desc: Australia’s birds of prey are some of the region's fiercest predators. These highly specialised killers are powerful, resourceful and striking; they use some impressive weapons to survive. This is the story of Australia’s aerial hunters.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: E4 - Platypus Predicament
programme.desc: Stand by as rescue officers use a technique called flagging to nab a koala with dangerously inflamed eyes. Soothe burned possum feet with vet Tim, then shadow vet Karina as she examines a half-drowned platypus before referring him to a specialist.

programme.title: E5 - Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: Juggle the demands of caring for sick koala joeys with vet Claire, then see what it takes to save a squirrel glider caught in barbed wire. Take care of an exhausted owl and get a big surprise when vet Tim X-rays a turtle that was struck by a car.

programme.title: E2 - Hunting with the Manzi
programme.desc: Run into a lion-hyena showdown with Julz as he hunts for the elusive Manzi pack, who are missing four of their precious pups. Then join Henry from the Zambian Carnivore Programme on a house call to the Kakumbi den, where another pup has gone AWOL.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E3 - Change in the Air
programme.desc: Watch life on the farm adjust as the leaves start to turn, from the sheep whose woolly coats keep them warm during the first frost to the bees that feed on the last bit of nectar before hibernation.

programme.title: E4 - The Feathering Nest
programme.desc: Successful breeding is critical to the survival of any bird species, and in this episode we meet four species of birds which go to exceptional lengths to find mates and raise their young, giving the next generation the best chance of life. Wherever they live, these birds have got their work cut out, holding their territory against invaders, attracting and winning partners and safeguarding their chicks.

E223 - The Crew Builds A Kangaroo Safari / The Crew Plays In The Construction Game
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: E224 - The Crew And Rocky Build A Bear Island
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.title: E610 - Pups Save A Manatee / Pups Save Breakfast
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp. // Mr. Porter and Alex are in a sticky situation - they're up to their ears in maple syrup! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the Porter's and Breakfast!

programme.title: E246 - The Quarrel
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are having a quarrel and decide they are not best friends anymore. As time goes by they really miss each other but they still refuse to make up.

programme.title: E510 - Deep Sea Grand Prix
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ are racing under the ocean! Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line!

programme.title: E104 - The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: E401 - The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy?

programme.title: E202 - Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: E203 - Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E246 - The Quarrel
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are having a quarrel and decide they are not best friends anymore. As time goes by they really miss each other but they still refuse to make up.

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: E218 - Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant / The Crew Cooks Up A Community
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: E207 - The Barbapapa Family / The House Of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: E203 - Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: E305 - The Crew Builds A Giant Skate Track / The Crew Builds A Giant Ice Cream Mak
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: E120 - The School Fete
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the school fair, and do lots of stuff while they're there. Peppa and her friends get their faces painted as tigers.

programme.title: E101 - The Royal Fairy Picnic / Gaston The Ladybird
programme.desc: Holly invites Ben on the annual Royal Fairy Picnic. King Thistle hopes there won't be a repeat of last year's jelly flood. // Holly and Ben try to cheer up Gaston by tidying his cave. But Gaston liked his cave just as it was, all messy and untidy.

programme.title: E409 - Pups Save A Sleepwalking Bear / Pups Save Dude Ranch Danny
programme.desc: The pups need to get a sleepwalking bear back home before he wakes up. // Daring Danny X takes his horse off the trail and ends up on a wild ride.

programme.title: E611 - Pups Save The Land Pirates / Pups Save The Birdwatching Turbots
programme.desc: Pirates Alex, Julia, Julius and Chick-ARR-letta, are sent sailing into the desert and got lost! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save these Land pirates. // Cap'n Turbot and Francois chirp for help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air.

programme.title: E207 - The Barbapapa Family / The House Of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.desc: HONG KONG PERSPECTIVES: Hong Kong Perspectives is a Cantonese-language programme. Through interviewing people from different walks of life and key figures in major events, the programme provides viewers with an in-depth understanding of Hong Kong. Staying close to public sentiment and targeting hot topics of social concern, it dissects Hong Kong's current affairs and future prospects from political, economic, livelihood, and cultural perspectives, examining them with varying degrees of depth and perspective.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.desc: Alexander begins in Mumbai, riding the city's gleaming new metro before venturing into a forest with the world's highest concentration of leopards. From there, he heads to Bangalore, India's tech capital, where the future and tradition sit side by side.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Discover how the makers of madras sambar, an ancient Indian vegetable stew, manage to fit an entire aromatic meal into a small can; the surprisingly sumptuous combo of lemony chocolate and cottage cheese is molded into Moo Moo bars, a modern update of a frozen Russian treat.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Alexander begins in Mumbai, riding the city's gleaming new metro before venturing into a forest with the world's highest concentration of leopards. From there, he heads to Bangalore, India's tech capital, where the future and tradition sit side by side.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Alexander begins in Mumbai, riding the city's gleaming new metro before venturing into a forest with the world's highest concentration of leopards. From there, he heads to Bangalore, India's tech capital, where the future and tradition sit side by side.

programme.title: E4 - Japan
programme.desc: For 250 years Japan has thrived, largely cut off from the west - until US gunboats arrive.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Don't Cry This At Home
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand look at the cool bit of body kit that sucks your tears away when you cry, and Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph prepare for lift-off in a mind-boosting mission to space.

programme.title: Teamwork Makes The Dream Work
programme.desc: In Birmingham, four young gymnasts are taking the world of male artistic gymnastics by storm. The boys are trained by coach Luke, who is himself a former Olympian, and they are setting themselves big targets for the National Championships.

programme.title: Coming Back Stronger
programme.desc: Artistic gymnast Chase is finally training again after his broken arm dashed all hopes of competing at the British Championships last season. Chase is planning his comeback at the National Championships in Birmingham and is going all out to make a big impact.

programme.title: A Singing Dog
programme.desc: Tilly, the dog, needs an operation to sort her wonky legs. The Junior Vets are checking Blue's teeth, and Johnny and Inel discover a singing dog and help the owner of an angry bird.

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: Surfing Snails
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers return to Table Mountain National Park in South Africa to discover the strange ways animals have adapted to survive in their secret worlds. Along the way they meet bats, surfing snails, and an army of ants protecting unusual plants.

programme.title: Maths & Architecture
programme.desc: From simple shelters to futuristic cities, buildings and structures are essential to our existence. Mathematics makes all this possible. Without it, bridges would collapse, and skyscrapers would be wonky. So how did mathematics help us rise above the life in caves?

programme.title: The Musical Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and her classmates are tasked with playing a piece of music written by a local billionaire, who has promised to donate funding to the school's music program – but only if Addison can solve a musical puzzle and correctly fill in the blanks in the sheet music!

programme.title: The Not So Fishy Mystery
programme.desc: When the fish in the local pond all seem to disappear, Addison and Tess fear that they ended up as fish sticks in the school cafeteria's lunch special and set out to solve the mystery

programme.title: Fairy Story
programme.desc: A dark forest gives Smorph the shivers, could there be a dragon inside? Perhaps it just needs a brave and smart fairy to investigate.

programme.title: Ocean Currents
programme.desc: Exhausted, Kit lets the sea currents carry him north, while Mr. Battery would prefer to return to their home in the south.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: Fascinating Fossils
programme.desc: Were all dinosaurs reptiles? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of palaeontology. Have hands-on fun by creating a dinosaur egg, and get to know Teuku Jacob, who used fossils and remains to study the origins and predecessors of present human species.

programme.title: Ebb's Paw
programme.desc: Ebb and Flo play on the beach with Bird until Ebb hurts a paw. Flo carries Ebb home to Ma. Granma wants to see Ebb and give special treats. Later, Bird squeaks Ebb's ball. Ebb can't resist a splash! The sore paw is better. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Fall of the Guardians
programme.desc: It's exam time at Regal Academy, and Rose, Hawk, Travis, Astoria and Joy have special classes taught by the Guardian Dragons themselves! They're interrupted by the Wicked Stepsisters, who take control of the Dragons and turn them against our heroes!

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: Ocean Currents
programme.desc: Exhausted, Kit lets the sea currents carry him north, while Mr. Battery would prefer to return to their home in the south.

programme.title: Heart-Hacked
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy have been messing with the affections of a nerd they met online, pretending to be a girl to make fun of him. But the nerd is a professional hacker, and the tables are turned...

programme.title: Who's Getting Snotted?
programme.desc: There's a snot-tastic dose of Ouchology as the doctors face tough medical questions, and a VIP guest is due in the lab to help explain why DNA is a funny, twisty shape. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Jan has cut his eyebrow, and Lennox has hurt his knee.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met.....a Lamp
programme.desc: Henry meets an old dusty brass lamp in an antiques shop. Lamp wants to be a magic lamp and grant people wishes.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met...a Cookbook
programme.desc: Henry meets a Cookbook. Cookbook is full of hundreds of delicious recipes but he is stuck on the book shelf.

programme.title: Bianca Ciocirlan: Hoverboard Performer
programme.desc: Young hoverboard artist Bianca Ciocirlan shares how she became the best in the world, achieving forty-five pirouettes on a hoverboard in thirty seconds. Bianca is also a professional hoverboard performer and former figure skater.

programme.title: Who's Getting Snotted?
programme.desc: There's a snot-tastic dose of Ouchology as the doctors face tough medical questions, and a VIP guest is due in the lab to help explain why DNA is a funny, twisty shape. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Jan has cut his eyebrow, and Lennox has hurt his knee.

programme.title: The Very Unusual Stalk-eyed Fly
programme.desc: The stalk-eyed fly looks fairly normal as it emerges from its pupa. Then it blows air bubbles up inside its head and along the eyestalks - like blowing up the world's weirdest balloon. It does this to make itself look more attractive to other stalk-eyed flies.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: Fairy Story

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: Coming Back Stronger
programme.desc: Artistic gymnast Chase is finally training again after his broken arm dashed all hopes of competing at the British Championships last season. Chase is planning his comeback at the National Championships in Birmingham and is going all out to make a big impact.

programme.title: A Singing Dog
programme.desc: Tilly, the dog, needs an operation to sort her wonky legs. The Junior Vets are checking Blue's teeth, and Johnny and Inel discover a singing dog and help the owner of an angry bird.

programme.title: E16 - 從被潑冷水到渴望被照亮
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E12 - 中年雄競開啟
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E3 - 重生之娘娘團商戰打起來了？
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E5 - 馬嘉祺符龍飛新生代炸場
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E16 - 從被潑冷水到渴望被照亮
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: 2021 Jiangsu Count Down Concert (Repackaged)
programme.desc: 頂級夢幻舞美，豪華明星陣容，陪你一起倒數迎接新年到來! 嘉賓包括：李克勤、朴樹、韓紅、李宇春、周筆暢、譚維維、毛不易、張傑、周深、王源、劉維、郎朗、金晨、王霏霏、薛之謙、硬糖少女303、THE9組合等。

programme.title: E18 - Chrissie And Jamie

programme.title: I Was Octomom: The Natalie Suleman Story
programme.desc: In January 2009, Natalie gave birth to eight babies--the first human to accomplish this miraculous feat. However, instead of being celebrated for a record-breaking event, she faced harsh scrutiny.

programme.title: TV Patrol Regional
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal[Live]
programme.desc: LUCKY YOU! Open the briefcase and welcome the winnings. The Pambansang Host Luis Manzano is back, together with 20 lucky stars, as they play in all‑new original episodes of the luckiest season yet of Kapamilya Deal or No Deal!

programme.title: Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal[Live]
programme.desc: LUCKY YOU! Open the briefcase and welcome the winnings. The Pambansang Host Luis Manzano is back, together with 20 lucky stars, as they play in all‑new original episodes of the luckiest season yet of Kapamilya Deal or No Deal!

programme.title: Loida Lewis Podcast[Live]
programme.desc: Loida Nicolas Lewis, a remarkable entrepreneur, philanthropist, and advocate, as she invites you to live, love, laugh, and learn together. From Loida's humble beginnings in Sorsogon, Philippines, to her groundbreaking achievements in law and business, Loida's journey is as inspiring as it is empowering.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Dancing Pina
programme.desc: Two spectacular dance projects show how a young generation of dancers from all over the world are rediscovering Pina's choreography: the Semperoper Ballet Company in Dresden rehearses Pina's dance opera Iphigenia in Tauris, and dancers from all over Africa rehearse Pina's ballet Le Sacre du Printemps at the Ecole des Sables in Senegal.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan E233
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: Jagadhatri E178
programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.title: Grand Trunk Rasoi E12
programme.desc: An experienced chef presents the history of several dishes that originated along the Grand Trunk Road and talks about the various ingredients used.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas E116
programme.desc: Lakshmi, a strong-willed woman, bravely faces pressures in a traditional joint family and stays by her husband Shriniwas, who works hard to build his dream house.

programme.title: Saru E360
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak E304
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas E116
programme.desc: Lakshmi, a strong-willed woman, bravely faces pressures in a traditional joint family and stays by her husband Shriniwas, who works hard to build his dream house.

programme.title: E27 - Pirates
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: E4 - River Chub
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: E4 - River Chub
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E31 - Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: E5 - Ufo
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: E19 - Tatocar Takeover
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses a remote control to drive the Tato Team to the far side of the supermarket. Can they return and save the fruit and veggie aisle?

programme.title: E101 - Bottom Bump
programme.desc: The Teletubbies bottom bounce on The Tubby Bouncy before wiggling their bottoms to a special bottom bump song.

programme.title: E15 - Ship
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `ship', and goes on a whirlwind word adventure. They see lots of different types of ships: a big ship, a sailing ship, a pirate ship, and a shaky, shaky ship.

programme.title: E11 - Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E37 - Mars Mission, Chile
programme.desc: Xuli and Foz help NASA after a close encounter with a UFO makes them lose the Mars Rover.

programme.title: E6 - The Weekend
programme.desc: At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. But Bingo gets upset when she discovers a walking leaf insect and Dad doesn't notice.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E15 - Andy And The Black Bear Cubs
programme.desc: In this episode, Andy, Jen and Scout head to Alaska, America on a baby animal mission to help rescue some black bear cubs high up in a tree. Along the way, Andy meets a grumpy Arctic ground squirrel.

programme.title: E33 - The Island Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but where's all the food?

programme.title: E31 - The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E31 - Woolly Memories
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E32 - Beach Break
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are spending a day at the beach, aiming to build some sand animals.

programme.title: E13 - It's Time To Find A Dinosaur
programme.desc: After playing with her toy dinosaurs, JoJo decides she would love to see a real one. Gran Gran takes JoJo to the museum to see a fossilised skeleton of a Tyrannosaurus rex!

programme.title: E8 - Curry Quest
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: E7 - The Pen Pal Badge
programme.desc: Duggee arranges for the Squirrels to write to some pen pals.

programme.title: E2 - Gooseberry
programme.desc: Gooseberry sings a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member

programme.desc: Carrot, Potato, Parsnip and Brussels Sprout perform the festive classic Auld Lang Syne.

programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `ship', and goes on a whirlwind word adventure. They see lots of different types of ships: a big ship, a sailing ship, a pirate ship, and a shaky, shaky ship.

programme.title: E11 - Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E37 - Mars Mission, Chile
programme.desc: Xuli and Foz help NASA after a close encounter with a UFO makes them lose the Mars Rover.

programme.title: E6 - The Weekend
programme.desc: At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. But Bingo gets upset when she discovers a walking leaf insect and Dad doesn't notice.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E31 - Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: E5 - Ufo
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: E19 - Tatocar Takeover
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses a remote control to drive the Tato Team to the far side of the supermarket. Can they return and save the fruit and veggie aisle?

programme.title: E27 - Pirates
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: E7 - Special Traditions
programme.desc: Traditions are shaped over time. They are also perpetuated by techniques magnified by Mauviel, Lison de Caunes and Solene Eloy to perfection. Watches, corsets, hoop earrings: small objects can tell great stories.

programme.title: E4 - Vise
programme.desc: Located along the Meuse River, Vise offers an ideal setting for walkers. It includes: Argenteau, Cheratte, Lanaye, Lixhe-Loen and Richelle. Among the highlights: the town hall, a jewel of Mosan Renaissance architecture, its marina, and the Collegiate Church of Saint Martin.

programme.title: E5 - Champagne: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Pascal Bourguignon photographs the classified vineyards of the Marne Valley; the Michelin-starred chef Arnaud Lallement opens the doors to his kitchen; Elsa Berthelot continues the age-old tradition of the ''Compagnons du Devoir''; Champagne Avenue in Epernay, provides a showcase for the world's most prestigious wine merchants...

programme.title: E5 - Halloween At The Castle
programme.desc: The Chateau d'Helecine gets into the Halloween spirit with multimedia shows, from the park to the orangery, including the main courtyard and the dome. Also featured: a friendly meeting between Salvatore Adamo and Michel Drucker; watchmaker Gilles Clavareau; and Thierry Verhoeven's kumquat gin.

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.title: E101
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E51 - Aix-Les-Bains (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on the region's spa tradition and the Faure Museum.

programme.title: E17 - Martres-Tolosane: Women Bring Earthenware To Life
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: E3 - Baulmes For The Soul
programme.desc: Mireille Keita builds bridges between the country that offered her a home, Switzerland, and her native Africa. She is the organiser of the Yelen Africa Festival in Baulmes, showcasing the advantages of cultural mixity. The profits are then used to improve people's lives in several villages in Mali.

programme.title: E101

programme.title: E2 - Ami Paris/The Raglan Sleeve
programme.desc: Founded in 2011 by Alexandre Mattiussi, the brand AMI Paris has conquered men's fashion. Everything you need to know about the raglan sleeve.

Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E51 - Aix-Les-Bains (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on the region's spa tradition and the Faure Museum.

programme.title: E101
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E51 - Aix-Les-Bains (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on the region's spa tradition and the Faure Museum.

programme.title: E3 - Baulmes For The Soul
programme.desc: Mireille Keita builds bridges between the country that offered her a home, Switzerland, and her native Africa. She is the organiser of the Yelen Africa Festival in Baulmes, showcasing the advantages of cultural mixity. The profits are then used to improve people's lives in several villages in Mali.

programme.title: E3 - Baulmes For The Soul
programme.desc: Mireille Keita builds bridges between the country that offered her a home, Switzerland, and her native Africa. She is the organiser of the Yelen Africa Festival in Baulmes, showcasing the advantages of cultural mixity. The profits are then used to improve people's lives in several villages in Mali.

programme.title: E3 - Baulmes For The Soul

She is the organiser of the Yelen Africa Festival in Baulmes, showcasing the advantages of cultural mixity. The profits are then used to improve people's lives in several villages in Mali.

programme.title: E7 - Special Traditions
programme.desc: Traditions are shaped over time. They are also perpetuated by techniques magnified by Mauviel, Lison de Caunes and Solene Eloy to perfection. Watches, corsets, hoop earrings: small objects can tell great stories.

programme.title: E4 - Vise
programme.desc: Located along the Meuse River, Vise offers an ideal setting for walkers. It includes: Argenteau, Cheratte, Lanaye, Lixhe-Loen and Richelle. Among the highlights: the town hall, a jewel of Mosan Renaissance architecture, its marina, and the Collegiate Church of Saint Martin.

programme.title: E5 - Champagne: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Pascal Bourguignon photographs the classified vineyards of the Marne Valley; the Michelin-starred chef Arnaud Lallement opens the doors to his kitchen; Elsa Berthelot continues the age-old tradition of the ''Compagnons du Devoir''; Champagne Avenue in Epernay, provides a showcase for the world's most prestigious wine merchants...

programme.title: E5 - Halloween At The Castle
programme.desc: The Chateau d'Helecine gets into the Halloween spirit with multimedia shows, from the park to the orangery, including the main courtyard and the dome. Also featured: a friendly meeting between Salvatore Adamo and Michel Drucker; watchmaker Gilles Clavareau; and Thierry Verhoeven's kumquat gin.

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: Channel Japan
programme.desc: 'Channel Japan' offers a fresh look at the latest in the economy, business, technology, culture and sightseeing of Japan.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: E10 - Mommy’s Proud Day
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E1 - A Barnyard Boogie with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready for a barnyard boogie with JJ & his friends! The dance party kicks off on the farm with a fun rendition of the 'Yes, Yes Vegetable Song,' where all the animals come to dance. Then, it's time to wake up the little bunny friends with a merry tune & hop, march & skip around! Join the fun as the kids sing 'Old Macdonald,' ride a little green tractor to find their animal pals & search for five little ducks all over the farm. It's a day full of singing, dancing & farm fun!

programme.title: E8 - Mommy’s Helping Heart
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E10 - Mommy’s Proud Day
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E3 - Baby John's Bath & Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for some bath & bedtime fun with Baby John! First, Baby John is a little scared to try swimming, but his family is there to show him just how easy & fun it can be! Then, it's time for a bath. Bathtime has never been so exciting, as Baby John has fun learning his colors by matching different colored bath sharks to their hoops. Finally, it's time to get ready for bed with a fun story & a cozy cuddle.

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - Join JJ's Fun Learning Club!
programme.desc: Come on & join JJ's fun learning club! The adventure starts with a field trip to the farm where JJ & his friends learn to count to ten using apples. The learning continues in the classroom as Ms. Appleberry sends the kids on a scavenger hunt to find items in every color of the rainbow. Even lunchtime is fun, as the family finds all the different shapes in JJ's lunch! From taking care of pets to learning yoga, there's always something new to learn!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E1 - Kittens, Tutus & Fun Tea Parties!
programme.desc: It's CeCe Time, full of kittens, tutus & fun! The big day arrives when CeCe gets her very own adorable kitten! She loves her new friend & wants to put on a show, so she gets in her ballerina outfit to dance for her kitty. Then, after hosting many tea parties for her stuffed animals, CeCe invites her real friends JJ & Bella over for a high tea party! From ice skating with Mom to imagining stick ponies are unicorns, it's always a fun & graceful day with CeCe!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: Wine War
programme.desc: Shui Zhang and Waley were buddies at an orphanage. Adopted by a French couple and moved to France at a young age, Waley has become a wine connoisseur prodigy. Left alone in China, Shui Zhang grows up to be a braggart and a nobody. When Shui Zhang travels to France one day to enlist Waley's help in auctioning a bottle of red wine called 'The God of Wine,' said to contain Kublai Khan's secret wine-brewing recipe, Waley accepted the challenge in a heartbeat. During the auction, Waley encounters a representative from the seller, the beautiful Yvonne, and falls in love with her at first sight. The other potential buyer is the wealthy and imposing coal tycoon Changfang Fang. While he appears to be a rich and vulgar brute on the surface, he is much more than meets the eyes. Adding to the mystery is the private connoisseur of suspicious origins following Fang everywhere. To Waley's surprise, Zhang and Fang seem to be sharing secrets between themselves. The group of buyers set off an

programme.title: Still Human
programme.desc: A paralyzed and hopeless man meets his new Filipino domestic helper who has put her dreams on hold to come to Hong Kong to earn a living. These two strangers live under the same roof, and they learn to face the different seasons of life.

programme.title: One Last Bloom
programme.desc: Forty years after leaving Japan for a boxing career in the U.S. that never panned out, Jin returns to restart his life with his old boxing buddies. When hotheaded young boxer Shogo asks for Jin's help to get him back into the ring after an unfair loss, the two men decide to seize their final chance at glory.

programme.title: Monster
programme.desc: When her young son Minato starts to behave strangely, his mother feels that there is something wrong. Discovering that a teacher is responsible, she storms into the school demanding to know what's going on. But as the story unfolds through the eyes of mother, teacher and child, the truth gradually emerges.

programme.desc: 4 mad men, starving for dopamine and thrills, are setting off in search of the 'craziest' challenges hidden around the world.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。
